title: AI Access Control by Role
excerpt: Currently, AI features in monday.com can only be enabled or disabled at the account level. I’d love to see this functionality extended to the role level, so we can manage AI access more granularly.

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, AI features in monday.com can only be enabled or disabled at the account level. I’d love to see this functionality extended to the role level, so we can manage AI access more granularly.
